parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM events WHERE event_type = 'email_incoming' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as created,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as completed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'open' AND deadline < NOW()) as overdue
FROM tasks

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_calls,
  SUM(tokens_input) as total_input_tokens,
  SUM(tokens_output) as total_output_tokens,
  SUM(cost_usd) as total_cost,
  AVG(latency_ms) as avg_latency
FROM workflow_logs
WHERE log_type = 'ai_call' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM workflow_logs WHERE log_type = 'error' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'pending') as pending,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE approved_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as approved
FROM approvals

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_type = 'email_incoming' AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as emails_processed,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as tasks_created,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE completed_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as tasks_completed,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE status = 'open' AND deadline <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND deadline > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as tasks_overdue,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_logs WHERE log_type = 'ai_call' AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as ai_total_calls,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tokens_input), 0) FROM workflow_logs WHERE log_type = 'ai_call' AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as ai_total_input_tokens,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tokens_output), 0) FROM workflow_logs WHERE log_type = 'ai_call' AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as ai_total_output_tokens,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) FROM workflow_logs WHERE log_type = 'ai_call' AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as ai_total_cost,
  (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(latency_ms), 0) FROM workflow_logs WHERE log_type = 'ai_call' AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as ai_avg_latency,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_logs WHERE log_type = 'error' AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as errors_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvals WHERE status = 'pending' AND created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as approvals_pending,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvals WHERE approved_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND approved_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') as approvals_approved

parameters.title: =Weekly Operations Digest - {{ $('Calculate Trends').item.json.date }}

parameters.content:
## REPORT__WeeklyDigest
Monday 9:00 AM executive weekly operations digest.

- Aggregates seven-day email, task, AI usage, error, and approval metrics
- Compares against the previous seven-day period
- Calculates trend percentages and rate changes
- Generates a strategic digest via UTIL__AICall
- Creates a Google Doc and notifies #executive-updates
